testcase.name: deveCriarProduto

error.message: Unresolved compilation problems: The declared package "com.joyce" does not match the expected package "" ProdutoService cannot be resolved to a type ProdutoService cannot be resolved to a type Produto cannot be resolved to a type ProdutoService cannot be resolved to a type ProdutoService cannot be resolved to a type
